Dashboard Shop Details Manage Menu Profile

Menu Management

Build a proper menu for your shop. Add item names, descriptions, prices, real product images, dietary details, and availability. Edit items in a popup so you never need to scroll all the way back to the top just to confirm it worked.

    • Loading your menu workspace...

    Your menu summary will appear here.

    Total items 0
    Available 0
    Sold out 0
    With photos 0

    Your Menu Items

    Search through your menu, then edit or delete any item directly from its card. Items stay linked to the signed-in vendor.

    Showing 0 of 0 items

    The list becomes scrollable automatically when your menu grows.

    No menu items added yet. Start by creating your first product.

      Menu Editor

      Create Menu Item

      Fill in the product details below and save them to your vendor menu.

      Creating New Item

      Allergen & Dietary Tags

      Select all that apply to this menu item:

      Allergens

      Dietary Labels

      ⚠️ Please select at least one tag.

      Product photos are stored in Firebase Storage. The menu item keeps only the image path and download URL in Firestore.
